resumes.parsedText:
Hema Priya .S

Web Developer

Hemapriya2442007@gmail.com

9843298159

# 121 Arakkonam Road, Tiruttani-631209



About :



I am a motivated Information Technology student with a strong interest in web development and software technologies. I am currently learning front-end and back-end web development and have gained a solid foundation in basic Python programming. I enjoy building practical projects, learning new technologies, and continuously improving my technical and problem-solving skills to prepare for a successful career in the IT industry.

Education:



I am currently pursuing a Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Information Technology at Jeppiaar Institute of Technology. Through my academic coursework, I am gaining a strong foundation in core IT concepts, programming, and emerging technologies, along with hands-on experience in problem-solving and project-based learning.

Experiences:



I completed a one-month internship at (HVF) Heavy Vehicle Factory, Avadi, where I worked on projects including “HVF – Leave Portal”. During this training, I gained practical experience in PHP,HTML, CSS ,JS and learned the basics of MySQL and database management, along with exposure to real-world application development.

PROJECTS:

     

Password strength checker with using python source code

HVF – Leave Portal

Technical skills:



HTML

CSS

PYTHON

linkTips.linkedin: LinkedIn profile missing. Action Tip: Linking a fully-optimized LinkedIn profile increases hiring rates by 71%.
linkTips.github: GitHub profile missing. Action Tip: Essential for Developers. Show off your clean coding habits and repository history.
linkTips.portfolio: Personal portfolio website missing. Action Tip: Having a personalized custom domain builds a highly premium personal brand.

grammarIssues.message: Avoid passive/filler words. Found: "motivated". Replace with active results-oriented text.
Weak action verb presence. Try using stronger verbs such as: "Spearheaded", "Optimized", or "Engineered" to show active leadership.
Missing quantitative metrics. Resumes are 40% stronger when accomplishments are backed by numbers, percentages, or dollar amounts.
